runners.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Must be included.

runners.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 600m at Q Parklands on February 22. Happy to overlook recent performances. Well placed and gets chance to find best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to finish the race over 600m at Q Parklands on February 22. Happy to overlook recent performances. Well placed and gets chance to find best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely checked rounding the first turn and lost considerable ground.

runners.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Has run blistering time here with a 21.66 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Has run blistering time here with a 21.66 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together on the first turn, became unbalanced and lost valuable ground.

runners.formComment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 352m at this track. Happy enough to avoid.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 352m at this track. Happy enough to avoid.

runners.formComment: Effortless winner to score by 7 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a solid 19.64 over the 352m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Effortless winner to score by 7 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a solid 19.64 over the 352m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

runners.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at this track over 390m (22.29) beating Maywyn's Queen in Grade 6 on April 7. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at this track over 390m (22.29) beating Maywyn's Queen in Grade 6 on April 7. Needs to find a bit more.

runners.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 352m at this track. Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 352m at this track. Can't make much of a case this time.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Capalaba (19.91) in a OPEN, finishing a 4.5 lengths sixth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Has ability and should be around the money.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 352m at this track. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 352m at this track. Looking to others this time.

runners.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early split and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 3.5 lengths sixth at this track over 352m in 20.07. Well placed and among the chances here.
